name: append_to_memory
description: Append a block to an existing memory's body, separated by a blank line. Preserves all existing content and wikilinks. Prefer this over update_memory for adding facts.

identifier.description: Memory title, filename, or absolute path.

addition.description: Markdown block to append. Will be separated from existing content by a blank line.

cwd.description: Optional. Absolute path used to discover the hub by walking up for `.bridgememory/`. Defaults to the server's process cwd.
